message: await inside a for…of loop runs the calls sequentially — for independent operations, collect them and use `await Promise.all(items.map(...))` to run them concurrently
help: Collect the items and use `await Promise.all(items.map(...))` to run independent operations concurrently

message: Context `value` prop is constructed inline — wrap with `useMemo`/`useCallback` or hoist a constant to avoid re-renders.
help: Memoize the context value (`useMemo`) or hoist it outside the render.

message: Visible non-interactive elements with click handlers must have a corresponding keyboard listener (`onKeyUp`, `onKeyDown`, or `onKeyPress`).
help: Pair `onClick` with `onKeyUp` / `onKeyDown` / `onKeyPress` for keyboard users.

message: Non-interactive element `<article>` should not have interactive event handlers — convert to a semantic interactive element or add an interactive role.
help: Move interactions to a semantic interactive element / add an interactive role.

message: Visible non-interactive elements with click handlers must have a corresponding keyboard listener (`onKeyUp`, `onKeyDown`, or `onKeyPress`).

message: Static HTML elements with event handlers require a role — add `role="…"` or use a semantic HTML element instead.
help: Static HTML elements with event handlers require a role, or use a semantic HTML element instead.

message: Non-descriptive handler name "handleChange" — name should describe what it does, not when it runs
help: Rename to describe the action: e.g. `handleSubmit` → `saveUserProfile`, `handleClick` → `toggleSidebar`

message: `<button>` elements must have an explicit `type` attribute.
help: Set `type="button"` (or `"submit"` / `"reset"`) explicitly on every `<button>`.
